ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the participant took the survey */,
  "ms_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the participant (e.g., ms, tv) */,
  "dv_order" TEXT /* Order of the survey (e.g., anti-first, pro-first) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Whether the participant has given consent to participate */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the participant's data is to be kept anonymous */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the survey */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., draft, active, archived) */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Whether the survey is published and available for participants */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey ends */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the participants */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the survey (e.g., age group, gender, location) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the question */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was last modified */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Whether the question is mandatory for the participant */,
  "options" TEXT /* Possible options for multiple-choice questions (JSON format) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who responded */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being responded to */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the participant */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was given */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Whether the response is correct (for questions with correct answers) */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken by the participant to answer the question (in seconds) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotions" (
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion */,
  "emotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the emotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emotion */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the emotion entry */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the emotion entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the emotion entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the emotion entry was last modified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the emotion record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the emotion record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_emotions" (
  "participant_emotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant-emotion pair */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emotion */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the emotion experienced by the participant */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the emotion was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant-emotion record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant-emotion record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_emotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_emotions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_emotions_emotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("emotion_id") REFERENCES emotions ("emotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psychological_states" (
  "psychological_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each psychological state */,
  "psychological_state_name" TEXT /* Name of the psychological state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the psychological state */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the psychological state entry */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the psychological state entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the psychological state entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the psychological state entry was last modified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the psychological state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the psychological state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("psychological_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_psychological_states_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_psychological_states_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_psychological_states" (
  "participant_psychological_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant-psychological state pair */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "psychological_state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the psychological state */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the psychological state experienced by the participant */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the psychological state was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant-psychological state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant-psychological state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_psychological_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_psychological_states_psychological_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("psychological_state_id") REFERENCES psychological_states ("psychological_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_psychological_states_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account is locked out due to failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
